102:1:2.m: the competing with each other in increasing

102:2:1.m: until, up to (shows the end point of زُرْتُمُ - your visiting)

102:2:3.m: the burial places/graveyards (object of زُرْتُمُ/you visited)

102:3:1.m: No indeed! (used for strong denial or rejection)

كَلَّا: No indeed! (used for strong denial or rejection)

102:4:1.m: then, next, afterwards (shows sequence of events in relation to سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ - you will know)

102:5:1.m: No indeed! By no means! (followed by لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ - if you only knew)

102:5:3.m: you all know (referring to the knowledge of certainty عِلْمَ ٱلْيَقِينِ)

102:6:1.m: surely you all will see (with strong emphasis)

102:6:2.m: the Hellfire (object of لَتَرَوُنَّ - you will surely see)

َ: (object of لَتَرَوُنَّ - you will surely see)

102:7:1.m: then (connects to لَتَرَوُنَّهَا - you will surely see it)

102:7:2.m: surely you all will see it (عَيْنَ ٱلْيَقِينِ)

102:7:3.m: eye (object of لَتَرَوُنَّهَا - you will surely see it)

102:8:1.m: then (connects to لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ - you will surely be asked)

102:8:2.m: you will definitely be asked (about النَّعِيمِ/the blessings)

102:8:3.m: on that day (when you will be asked about pleasure)

102:8:4.m: about/concerning (connects to لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ - you will be asked)

ِ: (connects to لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ - you will be asked)
